attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME              
,CREATION_DATE                 
,DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE             
,ETL_PROCESS_DTM               
,GLOBAL_NAME                   
,LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,LATEST_SC_FLAG                
,OTM_TERR_ID                   
,OTM_TERR_NAME                 
,OTM_TERR_TYPE_CODE            
,POS_TRANS_ID                  
,REBOK_CHANNEL_FLAG            
,SALESREP_NUMBER               
,SC_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CODE       
,SC_LAST_UPD_DATE              
,SC_REASON_CODE                
,SC_SPLIT_PERCENT              
,SC_TYPE_CODE                  
,SC_UNALLOCATED                
,SC_USAGE_CODE                 
,SHR_NODE_ID                   
,TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE           
,TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID               
,TRX_SOURCE_TYPE               
,USER_NAME                     
,WIPS_COST_PRICE               
,WIPS_LIST_PRICE               
,WIPS_UNIT_PRICE               
,SK3_SC_ID_INT                 
,LAST_UPDATED_DTM              
,DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT            
,LATEST_SALES_CREDIT_FLG       
,SOURCE_DELETED_FLG            
,SALES_CREDIT_DUPLICATE_FLG    
,TRX_VERSION_CHANGE_FLG        
,DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG        
,START_DATE                    
,EXPIRATION_DATE               
,UCRM_CASE_NUM                 
,TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY              
,TRX_SPLIT_ID                  
,SPLIT_1_BU_KEY                
,SPLIT_1_PERCENTAGE            
,SPLIT_2_BU_KEY                
,SPLIT_2_PERCENTAGE            
,TOTAL_SPLIT                   
                FROM   
$$EXCEPDB.EX_OTM_SLS_CRDTS_POS_OLY_RTNR EX
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.ST_OTM_SLS_CRDTS_POS_OLY_RTNR STG
WHERE EX.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID=STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID)

SELECT 
SM.POS_SCAAC_KEY					AS      POS_SCAAC_KEY,
STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID     					AS      SK_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID_INT,
STG.SC_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CODE     	AS      PD_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CD,
STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE   AS      BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT    	AS      PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
NSCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE     	AS      PD_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER    			AS      PD_BK_SALES_REP_NUM,
NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY   			AS      PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
STG.CREATION_DATE     				AS      PD_TRANSACTION_DT,
(STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT*100)     		AS      PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
STG.CREATION_DATE     				AS      PD_ADJUSTMENT_DT,
 'QTC'     							AS      PD_SS_CD,
NEU.ERP_USER_NAME    				AS      PD_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,              
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,               
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,              
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
STG.CREATION_DATE     				AS      START_TV_DTM,
(
CASE
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='N' AND STG.CREATION_DATE<>STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE THEN COALESCE((STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE- INTERVAL '1' SECOND),CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='N' AND STG.CREATION_DATE=STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE THEN COALESCE(STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='Y' AND STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE((STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE- INTERVAL '1' SECOND),CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='Y' THEN CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
END)  AS END_TV_DTM,
STG.SC_LAST_UPD_DATE  AS PD_SLS_CREDIT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
STG.OTM_TERR_ID AS SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_ID_INT,
STG.OTM_TERR_NAME AS SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_NAME,  
STG.OTM_TERR_TYPE_CODE AS SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_TYP_CD,
STG.SC_USAGE_CODE AS PD_SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD,
STG.SC_UNALLOCATED AS PD_SLS_CREDIT_UNALLOCATED_FLG, 
NSCAR.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD AS BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD,
STG.UCRM_CASE_NUM  ,
STG.TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY               AS SK_TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY_ID   ,     
STG.TRX_SPLIT_ID                   AS SK_TRX_SPLIT_ID           ,    
COALESCE(RTR.SALES_MOTION_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS    SALES_MOTION_CD         ,   
COALESCE(STG.SPLIT_1_PERCENTAGE  ,1.000000)          AS SPLIT_1_OFFR_ATTRBTN_PCT    ,  
COALESCE(STG.SPLIT_2_PERCENTAGE  ,1.000000)          AS SPLIT_2_NEW_RENEW_PCT        , 
COALESCE((STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT * STG.TOTAL_SPLIT  ),1.000000)   AS TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT  ,
COALESCE(STG.SPLIT_1_BU_KEY    ,-9999)            AS BK_OFFR_ATTRBTN_ID_INT        ,
COALESCE(RTR.POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY,-999) AS POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY ,
STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG					AS      ACTION_CODE,
CASE
WHEN STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE ='CREDIT' THEN 'I'
WHEN STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE ='DEBIT' THEN 'U'
END AS DML_TYPE                      
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_SLS_CRDTS_POS_OLY_RTNR STG
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPTL
ON STG.POS_TRANS_ID = NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCT
ON STG.SC_TYPE_CODE = NSCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
AND NSCT.END_TV_DATE ='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_SALES_REP_TV NESR
ON STG.SALESREP_NUMBER =CAST(CAST(COALESCE(NULLIF(NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN'),-999) AS INTEGER) AS VARCHAR(30))
AND NESR.END_TV_DATE ='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER NEU
ON STG.USER_NAME = NEU.ERP_USER_NAME
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
ON STG.SHR_NODE_ID = NSTT.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE ='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_POS_SCA_ADJ_CHNG_OLY_RTNR SM
ON SM.SK_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID_INT = STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASGNMNT_REASON NSCAR
ON STG.SC_REASON_CODE=NSCAR.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD
LEFT JOIN ( SEL POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY, SALES_MOTION_CD FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_TV PNVR
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY PNVR.POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY ORDER BY EDW_UPDATE_DTM DESC ) =1
   ) RTR
 ON  STG.SPLIT_2_BU_KEY=RTR.POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY 
  WHERE STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE <>'DR'



UNION

 
SELECT 
SM.POS_SCAAC_KEY					AS      POS_SCAAC_KEY,
STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID     					AS      SK_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID_INT,
STG.SC_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CODE     	AS      PD_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CD,
STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE   AS      BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT    	AS      PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
NSCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE     	AS      PD_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER    			AS      PD_BK_SALES_REP_NUM,
NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY   			AS      PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
STG.CREATION_DATE     				AS      PD_TRANSACTION_DT,
(STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT*100)     		AS      PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
STG.CREATION_DATE     				AS      PD_ADJUSTMENT_DT,
 'QTC'     							AS      PD_SS_CD,
NEU.ERP_USER_NAME    				AS      PD_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,              
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,               
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,              
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
STG.CREATION_DATE     				AS      START_TV_DTM,
(
CASE
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='N' AND STG.CREATION_DATE<>STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE THEN COALESCE((STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE- INTERVAL '1' SECOND),CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='N' AND STG.CREATION_DATE=STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE THEN COALESCE(STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='Y' AND STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE((STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE- INTERVAL '1' SECOND),CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='Y' THEN CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
END)  AS END_TV_DTM,
STG.SC_LAST_UPD_DATE  AS PD_SLS_CREDIT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
STG.OTM_TERR_ID AS SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_ID_INT,
STG.OTM_TERR_NAME AS SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_NAME,  
STG.OTM_TERR_TYPE_CODE AS SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_TYP_CD,
STG.SC_USAGE_CODE AS PD_SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD,
STG.SC_UNALLOCATED AS PD_SLS_CREDIT_UNALLOCATED_FLG, 
NSCAR.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD AS BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD,
STG.UCRM_CASE_NUM  ,
STG.TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY               AS SK_TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY_ID   ,     
STG.TRX_SPLIT_ID                   AS SK_TRX_SPLIT_ID           ,    
COALESCE(RTR.SALES_MOTION_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS    SALES_MOTION_CD         ,             
COALESCE(STG.SPLIT_1_PERCENTAGE  ,1.000000)          AS SPLIT_1_OFFR_ATTRBTN_PCT    ,  
COALESCE(STG.SPLIT_2_PERCENTAGE  ,1.000000)          AS SPLIT_2_NEW_RENEW_PCT        , 
COALESCE((STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT * STG.TOTAL_SPLIT  ),1.000000)   AS TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT  ,
COALESCE(STG.SPLIT_1_BU_KEY    ,-9999)            AS BK_OFFR_ATTRBTN_ID_INT        ,
COALESCE(RTR.POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY,-999) AS POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY ,
STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG					AS      ACTION_CODE,
CASE
WHEN STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE ='CREDIT' THEN 'I'
WHEN STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE ='DEBIT' THEN 'U'
END AS DML_TYPE                      
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_SLS_CRDTS_POS_OLY_RTNR STG
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPTL
ON STG.POS_TRANS_ID = NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCT
ON STG.SC_TYPE_CODE = NSCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
AND NSCT.END_TV_DATE ='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_SALES_REP_TV NESR
ON STG.SALESREP_NUMBER =CAST(CAST(COALESCE(NULLIF(NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN'),-999) AS INTEGER) AS VARCHAR(30))
AND NESR.END_TV_DATE ='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER NEU
ON STG.USER_NAME = NEU.ERP_USER_NAME
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
ON STG.SHR_NODE_ID = NSTT.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE ='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_POS_SCA_ADJ_CHNG_OLY_RTNR SM
ON SM.SK_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID_INT = STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASGNMNT_REASON NSCAR
ON STG.SC_REASON_CODE=NSCAR.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD
LEFT JOIN ( SEL POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY, SALES_MOTION_CD FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_TV PNVR
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY PNVR.POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY ORDER BY EDW_UPDATE_DTM DESC ) =1
   ) RTR
 ON  STG.SPLIT_2_BU_KEY=RTR.POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY 
WHERE STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE <>'DR'

SELECT 
CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME              
,CREATION_DATE                 
,DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE             
,ETL_PROCESS_DTM               
,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE                
,GLOBAL_NAME                   
,LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,LATEST_SC_FLAG                
,OTM_TERR_ID                   
,OTM_TERR_NAME                 
,OTM_TERR_TYPE_CODE            
,POS_TRANS_ID                  
,REBOK_CHANNEL_FLAG            
,SALESREP_NUMBER               
,SC_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CODE       
,SC_LAST_UPD_DATE              
,SC_REASON_CODE                
,SC_SPLIT_PERCENT              
,SC_TYPE_CODE                  
,SC_UNALLOCATED                
,SC_USAGE_CODE                 
,SHR_NODE_ID                   
,TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE           
,TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID               
,TRX_SOURCE_TYPE               
,USER_NAME                     
,WIPS_COST_PRICE               
,WIPS_LIST_PRICE               
,WIPS_UNIT_PRICE               
,SK3_SC_ID_INT                 
,LAST_UPDATED_DTM              
,DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT            
,LATEST_SALES_CREDIT_FLG       
,SOURCE_DELETED_FLG            
,SALES_CREDIT_DUPLICATE_FLG    
,TRX_VERSION_CHANGE_FLG        
,DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG        
,START_DATE                    
,EXPIRATION_DATE               
,UCRM_CASE_NUM                 
,TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY              
,TRX_SPLIT_ID                  
,SPLIT_1_BU_KEY                
,SPLIT_1_PERCENTAGE            
,SPLIT_2_BU_KEY                
,SPLIT_2_PERCENTAGE            
,TOTAL_SPLIT                   
 FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_SLS_CRDTS_POS_OLY_RTNR STG
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_POS_SCA_ADJ_CHNG_OLY_RTNR WK
WHERE WK.SK_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID_INT=STG.TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID )
AND STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE<>'DR'
